name_cn:
®Officially New® Basket
MCM Toni Visetos X-mini
Style 65040
·Cp Exclusive®️ New Pink
Crossbody or Shoulder Bag, Officially New!
This Toni shopper is enveloped in a new, serene, and refined soft pink tone. The unique geometric design is complemented by soft leather handles and an adjustable leather shoulder strap for versatile carrying.
Model: MWPFSMT03PZ001
Size: 16*9*14cm
Strap: 100-126cm/Removable
Handle Drop: 9cm
Color: Pink/Soft Pink
